active_scope: NautilusTrader adapter confined to EBTA runtime boundary
non_goals: No EBTA gate, status, threshold, or methodology change
No OOS opening before sealing and G-BIAS PASS
No Nautilus analyzer, tearsheet, or metric as EBTA verdict
No native-engine removal before Phase 6 PASS and dedicated reversible commit

steps.title: Contrat de types et migrations de schema
steps.objective: Create stdlib-only EBTA contracts and schema migrations required before any Nautilus-dependent code.

tasks.title: Write SimulationResult, CostModel, InstrumentConfig, and Candidate in strategies/contracts.py
Design and test the migration mechanism before concrete schema migrations
Migrate config and strategy payload schemas to 1.1.0 with explicit fixtures
Define SegmentSimulator and a lightweight fake test implementation

exit_criteria: procedures/detrending.py and procedures/economic_gate.py consume a fake-produced SimulationResult without code changes
Unit tests for contracts, StrategyPayload.from_dict(), schema migrations, and payload_factory pass
Runtime suite passes with python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation

steps.title: Spike de faisabilite Nautilus
steps.objective: Prove that NautilusTrader runs from the reproducible EBTA environment and produces a coherent SimulationResult on a deterministic toy case.

tasks.title: Version setup_env.ps1 and requirements.txt for nautilus_trader==1.230.0
Create deterministic golden-case fixture and expected_result()
Execute one candidate and one fold through a minimal run_segment path

exit_criteria: BacktestEngine instantiates and runs from the reproducible environment
SimulationResult from Nautilus matches expected_result() within explicit tolerance
K x (M+1) execution extrapolation is documented with real M/K inputs

steps.title: Brique N1 ingestion de donnees
steps.objective: Load XAUUSD and NASDAQ bars into Nautilus without precision loss or lookahead, with verified instrument construction.

tasks.title: Verify NASDAQ instrument class with nautilus-docs-research and mechanical tests

exit_criteria: Round-trip price and quantity tests pass for XAUUSD and NASDAQ
ts_init represents close time without lookahead

steps.title: Briques N2 et N3 strategie et couts
steps.objective: Execute any EBTA candidate in Nautilus through one generic Strategy class and sealed execution costs.
exit_criteria: add_venue() uses only sealed execution parameters
No default FillModel, FeeModel, or LatencyModel is used implicitly

steps.title: Briques N4 et N5 extraction et boucle multi-fold
steps.objective: Produce reliable SimulationResult objects from Nautilus and feed existing EBTA procedures without signature changes.

tasks.title: Implement run_segment() without segment metadata leakage
Implement extract_simulation_result() and golden-case regression tests
Implement strategy generation, robustness, economic metrics, and walk-forward runtime adapters

exit_criteria: Detrending, WRC, OOS confidence interval, and economic gate run on Nautilus data without signature changes
NO_MODEL handling and no segment metadata leakage tests pass

steps.title: Bascule et retrait du moteur natif
steps.objective: Produce a full PASS research_package through Nautilus, then remove the native engine cluster in a dedicated reversible commit.

tasks.title: Generate and validate a full Nautilus-backed research_package
Create annotated tag pre-nautilus-cutover before native removal
Remove native engine cluster in a dedicated commit and verify revertability

exit_criteria: validate_package_dir() returns PASS on the Nautilus-produced research_package
Runtime suite passes after native engine removal
No residual imports to the removed native engine cluster remain
The native-removal commit is mechanically revertable

completed_steps_archive.title: Encodage runtime de strategie x actif
Socle runtime G-BIAS incidents et registre
Deblocage des prerequis factuels du moteur natif
Levee du verrou de gouvernance pour le moteur natif
Moteur natif EBTA MVP jusqu'a Phase 8
Levee du verrou de gouvernance et synchronisation du cockpit
Contrat de types et migrations de schema
Briques N2 et N3 strategie et couts
Briques N4 et N5 extraction et boucle multi-fold

validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 1 contracts, migrations, payload factory, and fake simulator tests
Nautilus Phase 2 reproducible setup smoke test using the installed compatibility venv

validation_commands.command: python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation -p test_nautilus_phase2_golden_case.py
validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 2 deterministic golden-case regression tests

validation_commands.command: python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation -p test_nautilus_instrument_nasdaq.py
validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 3 NASDAQ/XAUUSD instrument and OHLCV bar mapping tests

validation_commands.command: python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation -p test_nautilus_phase4_strategy_costs.py
validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 4 sealed cost model and generic strategy bridge tests

validation_commands.command: python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation -p test_nautilus_phase5_run_segment.py
validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 5 run_segment, SimulationResult extraction, NO_MODEL, and multi-fold orchestration tests

validation_commands.command: python -m unittest discover -s Implementation\ebta_engine\tests -t Implementation -p test_nautilus_research_package.py
validation_commands.purpose: Nautilus Phase 6 research_package builder test with injected segment runner
Minimal pilot research_package smoke test after schema 1.1.0 migration

validation_commands.command: git diff --check -- .ai Implementation "0 - HUMAN START HERE"
validation_commands.purpose: Patch hygiene for Phase 0 cockpit sync

risk_register.risk: Relay files could become a competing EBTA source of truth.
risk_register.mitigation: .ai/checkpoint.json tracks macro workstream state only; runtime phase state lives in Implementation/Active/tracking.json.

risk_register.risk: NautilusTrader could become the source of EBTA verdicts instead of a simulation layer.
risk_register.mitigation: The hook and plan confine Nautilus to adapters and keep procedures, validators, gates, and package validation as EBTA-owned authorities.

risk_register.risk: Segment identity could leak into Nautilus and make Train/Test/OOS visible to the engine.
risk_register.mitigation: run_segment() and mapping tasks explicitly forbid segment metadata, and Phase 5 requires a regression test for this invariant.

risk_register.risk: The native engine cluster could be removed before the Nautilus research_package is PASS.
risk_register.mitigation: Phase 6 is gated by validate_package_dir() PASS, full runtime PASS, pre-nautilus-cutover tag, and a dedicated reversible removal commit.

risk_register.risk: NASDAQ instrument construction is not yet empirically confirmed against the installed Nautilus API.
risk_register.mitigation: Phase 3 requires nautilus-docs-research plus tests/test_nautilus_instrument_nasdaq.py before real construction is accepted.

risk_register.risk: The frozen protocol manifest hash test fails before Nautilus Phase 1 starts.
risk_register.mitigation: Resolved by correcting Protocole/MANIFESTE DE GEL EBTA.md to the SHA-256 of the already committed HISTORIQUE DES VERSIONS EBTA.md content; full runtime suite passes.

latest_decision.decision: NAUTILUS_P6_T1_RESEARCH_PACKAGE_PASS is complete: the injected builder test passes and the full Nautilus-backed research_package builds with status PASS under the dedicated Nautilus venv. Next action is the pre-nautilus-cutover tag before native cluster removal.
